posts.author: Streak
posts.text: Streak App Relaunch — @Abhijit_Sen1 We regret the inconvenience due to the revised timelines. Once the new Streak mobile app is officially launched, the update and availability will be communicated through our official channels. We sincerely appreciate your patience and support.

posts.author: Abhijit_Sen1
posts.text: Streak App Relaunch — @Streak Sir, Time is money. Everything has a release date…movies, ipo, criminals from jail…I tried multiple platforms… Play store… Zerodha support… Etc. First, the realease date was last week of April… Then it became first week of May… Now middle of May…Please, please specify a date… The beta version has become non-functional… login error… Will i get a notification on my Kite mobile app when Streak is relaunched???

posts.author: Streak
posts.text: Streak App Relaunch — @Abhijit_Sen1 We understand your concern regarding the mobile application. The app is tentatively scheduled for launch around mid-May 2026 and is currently in the final stages of testing. We appreciate your patience and understanding in this regard.

posts.author: Abhijit_Sen1
posts.text: Streak App Relaunch — Kindly specify the precise date when the Streak Mobile App will be relaunched. I was fully dependent on it. I have been a Zerodha customer for 14 years. Kindly specify a specific date. @Streak @Kunal_Streak @Rahul_Revankar @Hitesh_Streak @jaygori26
